title: User ability to take a notification and convert it to a board item or send to my work
excerpt: This request is similar to the one in updates, but if you @ mention someone, it would be awesome for that person to turn it into an action item for themselves either in my work or on a relevant board- just like you can i…

posts.author: jpostich (Jenny Postich)
posts.cookedHtml: This request is similar to the one in updates, but if you @ mention someone, it would be awesome for that person to turn it into an action item for themselves either in my work or on a relevant board- just like you can in Monday.docs
